programme.title: Tides Of Time
programme.desc: It's perigee where the Moon draws closest to Earth. Zafar races to harvest honey and move before his home floods. In China, the Silver Dragon tests Hangzhou's seawalls. In Korea, getbols are suffocating.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: Indonesia wants to ban one of the world's most popular computer game – Roblox. It says the game contains violence and immoral content. Other games are also in the censor's crosshairs,.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Asia First
programme.desc: (Live) Top stories, business news and market updates from across the region as Asia gears up for the day ahead.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: Indonesia wants to ban one of the world's most popular computer game – Roblox. It says the game contains violence and immoral content. Other games are also in the censor's crosshairs,.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: Money Mind
programme.desc: How rising fuel prices are forcing workers to make tough choices – the story of a Sri Lankan driver and a Filipino commuter. Also - one Singapore family's secret to halving their electricity bill.

programme.title: Safety By Choice, Not By Chance
programme.desc: The marine industry is one of the most dangerous places to work. CNA follows Jason Electronics service engineers boarding ships at port and anchorage, taking on high-risk jobs to keep vessels running safely.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: Tides Of Time
programme.desc: Before the arrival of the king tides, Sundarbans families brace their mud-wall homes while the Silver Dragon in China menaces crowds and fishermen. In Korea, Getbol mudflats emerge out of the water.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: We use our bath towel daily but how often are we washing it? Steven Chia sends our viewers' bath towels to a lab to find out what could be growing in them, if they're not washed often enough.

programme.title: The New Locals S2
programme.desc: South Koreans in Chennai embrace local life: learning Tamil, building friendships, and blending cultures, while redefining what it means to feel at home abroad.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: Metropolis
programme.desc: Can design bring us back to one another? Jenny Wu explores Singapore's third places, everyday spaces between home and work, to see how fostering connections should be the heart of a city's design.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programme.title: Japan Hour [English Subtitles]
programme.desc: A 150-km cycle ride through the Oki Islands off Japan's west coast. These beautiful islands are famed for their crystal clear seas, deep mysterious forests, and rich historical traditions.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Insight
programme.desc: Indonesia wants to ban one of the world's most popular computer game – Roblox. It says the game contains violence and immoral content. Other games are also in the censor's crosshairs,.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Tides Of Time
programme.desc: Supermoon king tides peak. In the Sundarbans, saltwater sickens otters. In China, surfers face the Silver Dragon's fury. And in Korea, the legal fight for getbols reaches a climax.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: Fighting Cancer follows three young Singaporeans with stage 4 cancer as they battle survival while juggling treatment, family, and work, revealing their resilience in the face of uncertainty.

programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: Far from the frontlines, yet close to the heart. From Los Angeles to Mumbai and Kuala Lumpur, Iran's diaspora is bound by shared roots, but divided over war, intervention and what should come next.

programme.desc: (Live) Non-stop breaking stories, expert analysis and extensive news coverage every hour.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Japan Hour [English Subtitles]
programme.desc: A 250-km cycle ride through Niigata under the midsummer sun. In brilliant green rice fields and deep in the mountains, we hear stories of tenacity overcoming disaster, of recovery and success.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programme.title: Money Mind
programme.desc: How rising fuel prices are forcing workers to make tough choices – the story of a Sri Lankan driver and a Filipino commuter. Also - one Singapore family's secret to halving their electricity bill.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Inside The Women's Prison
programme.desc: In the first episode of this three-part series, we follow six inmates as they navigate the rigour and realities of life behind bars.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: Eugene Lim's treatment fails, Joseph Nair fears relapse, and Lee Hwee Ling discovers new growth. As their cancers evolve, these three young cancer patients struggle to face their unknown.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: (Live) The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.title: Concorde: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Go inside the race to build the first supersonic airliner between Europe's Concorde, the Soviet TU144 and the American Boeing 2707. From the post-war jet boom to the death of the supersonic dream 40 years later, this is a story of engineering brilliance, international espionage and tragedy that surrounded the attempt to make the fastest airliner on earth. Also, could supersonic make a comeback?

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: The latest top stories of the hour.

programme.desc: Far from the frontlines, yet close to the heart. From Los Angeles to Mumbai and Kuala Lumpur, Iran's diaspora is bound by shared roots, but divided over war, intervention and what should come next.
